title: ROCKWOOD WATER FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: OUR JUST FUTURE ROCKWOOD WATER FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers qualifying customers financial assistance with their water bills. Provides a one-time crisis assistance payment of $150 or a bi-monthly discount of $25 on water bills for one year (six bills). 10550 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Low-income customers of Rockwood Water People's Utility District Hours: Tuesday/Friday 9am-11:45am and 1pm-4pm Email (503) 548-0217 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 548-0200 Main phone Portland Office (503) 548-0252 Main phone Community Relations Main phone (503) 548-0217 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for eligibility screening FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake For appointment after intake: -Current water bill -ID for everyone 18 years and older -Proof of income for the household in the last 30 days -Social security cards or numbers for everyone in the household LANGUAGES: English, Russian, Spanish, Ukrainian, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Rockwood Water People's Utility District (parts of Fairview, Gresham, and Portland in Multnomah County only, within zip codes 97233, 97236, 97030, 97024, and 97230). Services: Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYMENT SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUR JUST FUTURE
